title: Scheduled Task Scheduling
subtitle: Task Scheduling
description: Agents can autonomously create and manage scheduled tasks, supporting three scheduling modes: one-time, periodic, and cron expressions. Tasks are persisted and executed with callback loops to ensure reliable execution.
sub_problems: Agent callback execution loop after scheduled task trigger
Dual-entry task management via CLI and Agent
best_practices: Expose scheduling capabilities as Agent tools
Persist task state to disk to prevent data loss
Single-timer architecture to avoid resource waste from N jobs creating N timers
Decouple scheduling and execution via on_job callback; CronService independent of AgentLoop
Isolate conversation history with independent session_key per cron job

values.DeepCode: at (one-time) + every (interval) + cron expression with unified interface
Single asyncio.Task sleep-tick driven by global nearest wake-up time
Single JSON file with load-on-startup and save-on-change
CronTool inherits Tool ABC; autonomous operation via LLM function calling
on_job callback injects agent.process_direct() for complete Agent loop

solutions.title: CronService Scheduled Task Scheduling
solutions.description: DeepCode nanobot implements Agent-autonomous creation of three scheduling modes (at/every/cron) using asyncio single-timer and CronTool function calling, with JSON file persistence and on_job callback execution loop.
